title: LIP-LOSS-001 adjusted margin/norm MBPP32 held-out bridge evaluation
interpretation: Reducing lambda_margin from 0.10 to 0.05 and increasing lambda_norm from 0.05 to 0.10 improved held-out retrieval_top1 from 0.34375 to 0.375 relative to LIP-EVAL-024.
Held-out diagonal margin, norm ratio, and energy drift improved slightly, while held-out MSE and cosine diagonal worsened slightly.
The adjusted weighting is marginally better than the first LIP-LOSS-001 weighting, but still does not beat the lambda_mse=0.35 baseline on reconstruction or norm calibration.
Held-out diagonal margin remains negative, so pair-level held-out ranking is not robust.
This remains latent-space diagnostic evaluation only.
known_limitations: The held-out evaluation is latent-space only and does not evaluate text-level semantic fidelity.
The diagonal margin remains negative, so pair-level held-out ranking is not robust.
The result does not establish semantic transfer, model-to-model alignment, generalization, or production readiness.
data_policy: No generated eval outputs, checkpoints, shards, bundles, datasets, zips, caches, or run artifacts are committed.
scientific_claim_status: Latent-space diagnostic evaluation only. No semantic transfer, text-level fidelity, model-to-model alignment, generalization, or production readiness claim.
